output.summary: Fixed missing headingTag prop in ThemeHeading usage. The previous headingSize implementation only passed the numeric headingSize (which controls CSS text-size class) but not headingTag (which controls the actual HTML element). Without headingTag, the rendered HTML always used the default h2 regardless of the headingSize attribute value. Both TSX and PHP now pass headingTag matching the headingSize mapping.

issuesFixed.description: ThemeHeading always rendered <h2> even when headingSize was 'small' because headingTag was not passed
issuesFixed.fix: Added headingTag prop to ThemeHeading in TSX: headingTag={attributes.headingSize === 'small' ? 'h3' : 'h2'}. Added headingTag parameter to ThemeHeading template part in PHP: 'headingTag' => 'h' . $headingLevel.

tsx.change: Added headingTag prop to ThemeHeading component, mapping 'small' -> 'h3', 'regular' -> 'h2'

php.change: Added 'headingTag' => 'h' . $headingLevel to ThemeHeading template part args

buildStatus.notes: Build compiles with only pre-existing performance warnings

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both pass identical headingSize and headingTag values to ThemeHeading
